description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux MinGW that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for i686 and x86_64 architectures. For each architecture, use the addnab/docker-run-action to run a Docker container with the archlinux:latest image, install dependencies, and perform a build and deploy using scripts from the ports/ci/linux-mingw directory. Distinguish between release and daily builds based on the Git reference.
